name: Chicken & Rice Skillet
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Skinned and boned chicken (breasts or thighs, cut into strips 1/2 inch wide)
8 oz Sweet or spicy Italian sausage or Chorizo, sliced 1/4 inch thick
1 medium Yellow onion, finely chopped (1 cup)
1 medium Red bell pepper, cored, seeded and cut into strips 1/4 inch wide
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chicken with 1/4 teaspoon salt and 1/4 teaspoon black pepper each. In a 12-inch nonstick skillet, heat olive oil over moderate heat. Add chicken breasts and sausage (if using), stirring frequently for 5 minutes or until lightly browned. Transfer to a plate.
2. Add onion and red pepper to the skillet, sprinkle with remaining salt and pepper, and saute stirring for 5 minutes or until softened. Add garlic and rice, stiring for 1 minute. Add stock, tomatoes, cumin, and thyme; bring to boil over high heat. Lower heat and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes or until rice is tender.
3. Add peas, chicken, sausage, and olives (if using) to the skillet and mix well. Simmer for 5 minutes or until peas are tender and chicken and sausage are heated through. Serve with a green salad. Serves 4.
